title: Manage a Busy Inbox
drDigitalIntro: You've inherited a messy inbox with 20 unread emails. Your task: read through emails, identify which are important, reply to a few, forward one to a colleague, attach a document to an email, delete spam, and organize everything into folders. You'll also practice identifying a phishing email and avoiding it. This is how people manage email in the real world.
drDigitalSuccess: You can manage a complex email inbox like a professional!
drDigitalHint: Start by scanning subjects to find the important emails.
